Digital Soil Mapping in Agriculture

Home About Projects News

Madelyn Willis

M.S Student, University of Georgia, Department of Crop and Soil Sciences

Madelyn.Willis@uga.edu

Education

University of Georgia – Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science, Fall 2023

  • Certificate in Geographical Information Systems (GIS)
  • Undergraduate research: Impact of soil erosion and community trails on an old-growth tree environment

Research Positions

  • Undergraduate Research Assistant, Weed Science Lab - University of Georgia – 2023
    • Conducted laboratory and field work, collaborated with land managers and farmers
  • Undergraduate Research Assistant, Remote Sensing Lab – University of Georgia - Fall 2023 to Spring 2024
    • Performed analytical and field work using R.S imagery and spatial data
  • Graduate Research Assistant, Pedology Lab - University of Georgia - Fall 2024 to present
    • Conducting M.S. thesis research: Digital Soil Mapping in the U.S. Southern Coastal Plain

Teaching Positions

  • Teaching Assistant (CRSS 2010/2010L), Crop Science – July 2025 to present

Student Organization Roles

  • Lead Officer – Crop and Soil Science Student Society
  • Member – Graduate Student Association of Crop and Soil Sciences
  • Member – Integrative Precision Agriculture Student Club
  • Volunteer – 4-H outreach events across Georgia

Relevant Coursework

Geospatial & Data Science:

  • Remote Sensing of Environment I & II
  • Programming for GIS
  • Advanced Spatial Analysis
  • Data Science & Statistical Programming
  • Improving Nutrient and Energy Efficiency with GIS
  • Environmental Ethics
  • Natural Resource Economics
  • Society and Natural Resources

Soil & Environmental Science:

  • Pedology
  • Soil Fertility & Plant Nutrition
  • Soil Microbiology
  • Advanced Soil Pedology
  • Soils & Hydrology
  • Hydrogeochemical Field Methods
  • Experimental Methods in Natural Resources

Honors and Awards

  • Zell Miller Scholarship, 2018 -2023
  • First Place, Poster Presentation, Spring 2025 - Soil Science Society of Georgia
  • First Place, Poster Presentation, Spring 2025 - 2nd Integrative Precision Agriculture Conference
  • Crop and Soil Science Travel Award, Fall 2025

Memberships in Associations

  • Soil Science Society of Georgia
  • Soil Science Society of America
  • International Association for Landscape Ecology
